from __future__ import annotations


class SharedCacheStoreNegative:
    def __init__(self, read_cache: dict[str, str], write_buffer: dict[str, str]) -> None:
        self.read_cache = read_cache
        self.write_buffer = write_buffer

    def read(self, key: str) -> str:
        return self.read_cache.get(key, "")

    def stage_write(self, key: str, value: str) -> None:
        self.write_buffer[key] = value
